testsuite.name: agentforge.state.CheckpointStoreTest

testcase.name: listByWorkflow returns only checkpoints for that workflow

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:28.561 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-1 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.563 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-2 for workflow wf-2 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.567 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-1 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=0ms) 08:31:28.570 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-1 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.570 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-1 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.573 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-1 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.574 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-1 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.574 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-2 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.575 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-3 for workflow wf-2 (ttl=-1ms) 08:31:28.578 [Test worker] DEBUG agentforge.state.InMemoryCheckpointStore -- Saved checkpoint scp-1 for workflow wf-1 (ttl=-1ms)
